name: Mint Pizza Dough and Shrimp Topping
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Shrimp (optional, omit mozzarella if lactose intolerance)
Mint leaves or cilantro; finely chopped to taste
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: The Best Pizza Is Made At Home, Donna German
NOTE: Original recipe used 1 T. reduced it.
NOTE: Use more shrimp if desired. Omit mozzarella as Jeff has lactose intolerance.
NOTE: Without mozzarella, the flavor of shrimp and feta is even more pronounced.
1. Warm liquids to lukewarm (110°F).
2. Combine all dry ingredients (including yeast) in a food processor bowl and process for 10 seconds.
3. Pour oil and remaining liquid ingredients through the feeding tube until dough forms a ball.
4. If dough is sticky, add flour tablespoon at a time until not sticky.
5. Process dough into a ball, place in a greased bowl, cover with kitchen towel, and let rise 50-60 minutes in a warm, draft-free location.
6. Preheat oven to 475°F for at least 30 minutes if using a pan or 30 minutes to 1 hour if using a stone.
7. Grease pizza pan with olive oil or spray with nonstick vegetable spray.
8. Divide dough in half and roll out on lightly floured surface.
9. Assemble toppings: crumbled feta, shrimp (cooked, deveined, and diced), minced garlic, grated mozzarella, chopped mint leaves or cilantro.
10. Place rolled-out dough on prepared pan or parchment paper, add toppings, and bake until crust is golden and cheese is bubbly.
